# devhelm_tag (Resource)

Manages a DevHelm tag for organizing monitors.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "devhelm_tag" "production" {
  name  = "production"
  color = "#10B981"
}

resource "devhelm_tag" "checkout" {
  name  = "service:checkout"
  color = "#6366F1"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Human-readable name for this tag

### Optional

- `color` (String) Hex color code (e.g. #6B7280). Defaults to grey if omitted

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Unique identifier for this tag

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import devhelm_tag.production b2c3d4e5-6789-01ab-cdef-234567890123
terraform import devhelm_tag.production "production"
```
